q1.question: How many guests can the RhyLounge accommodate?
q1.answer: The RhyLounge is a small passenger event vessel on the Rhine in Basel and accommodates up to twelve guests. It is suitable for private events, business functions and farewell ceremonies.

q2.question: When is the RhyLounge season?
q2.answer: The RhyLounge operates year-round on the Rhine. Thanks to the heated interior, cruises are also possible during autumn and winter. Each trip is individually planned and tailored to your event and specific requirements.

q4.question: What happens in bad weather?
q4.answer: RhyLounge cruises take place even in rainy or cooler weather. The heated interior and sheltered seating ensure your event on the Rhine can be held comfortably regardless of weather conditions. In case of extreme weather, we will discuss the options with you in advance.

q5.question: Where is the boarding point?
q5.answer: The boarding location depends on the route and type of event. Departure and arrival points are arranged individually to ensure your Rhine cruise fits your event perfectly.

q6.question: How far in advance should I book?
q6.answer: We recommend booking as early as possible, especially for popular dates. Short-notice bookings may also be possible, subject to availability. Please contact us directly.

Footer.desc: Private boat tours on the Basel Rhine. Unforgettable moments for up to 12 guests.

Hero.sub: More than just a boat ride. Your exclusive retreat on the Rhine for aperitifs, dinner, and unforgettable moments.

Exp.sub: From your personal welcome to the moments that stay with you.
Exp.s1b: Your private captain welcomes you at the individually agreed boarding point along the Basel Rhine. Starting point and timing are arranged to fit your occasion.
Exp.s2b: As the RhyLounge glides gently along the Rhine, Basel reveals a special perspective. Historic bridges, the old town, the minster and the modern skyline pass by in a uniquely relaxed setting.
Exp.s3b: Sit back and enjoy your time on board. Whether Prosecco, a glass of wine or a carefully arranged aperitif platter, good food, conversation and time together take centre stage.
Exp.s4b: Shared conversations, laughter with friends, the atmosphere on the water and time together turn a RhyLounge cruise into a lasting memory.
Exp.eye1: The most innovative and comfortable small passenger boat on the Basel Rhine
Exp.eye2: Special moments deserve a special location.

AGrid.sub: Celebration, dinner, relaxed evening or quiet occasion: every trip is planned personally.
AGrid.o1c: Celebrate privately on the Rhine with family and friends, with food, drinks and music as desired.
AGrid.o2c: A special setting for client meetings, team dinners and small company events.

Social.sub: Read the latest ratings and comments directly on the RhyLounge Google Maps profile.
Social.googleText: The rating and comments are maintained live on Google. Visitors always see the latest status and real guest feedback.

CTA.sub: Secure your desired date. Fill out the form and we will contact you personally – usually the same day.

ContactForm.pMsg: Tell us about your planned event...
ContactForm.d3: and agree to the processing of my data.

ContactForm.sucD: Thank you for your request. We will contact you within 24 hours.

AngebotePage.sub: Every cruise is planned individually around your wishes. Whether a private celebration, a company event or relaxed time with friends and family, we create the right setting for your occasion on the Rhine.
AngebotePage.mainText: Every occasion is different, so the RhyLounge has no fixed programmes or prescribed schedules. We tailor the route, duration, boarding points, food and drinks to your wishes. You decide what your occasion should feel like and we take care of making it happen.
highlights: Private setting for up to 12 guests
AngebotePage.bottomD: Tell us what you are planning and we will see what we can make possible.

CateringPage.sub: Every occasion is different, so we tailor the food and drinks individually. Aperitif platters with regional specialities, fondue, raclette, tabletop grills, pasta dishes or brunch are all possible. Soft drinks, wine, beer and other drinks can also be arranged to suit your wishes.
CateringPage.mainKicker: Food and drinks to suit you
CateringPage.mainText: There are no fixed menus or predefined packages on the RhyLounge. We put together an offer that suits your group and occasion, from regional aperitif platters and fondue chinoise to raclette, tabletop grills, pasta dishes or brunch. Prosecco, wine, beer, soft drinks and coffee can also be arranged. We are happy to consider special requirements and individual ideas.
points: Put together individually for your group
CateringPage.bT: Do you have your own wishes?
CateringPage.bD: Tell us briefly what you have in mind. Together we clarify what makes sense and what is possible on board.

EventsPage.sub: From teambuilding to weddings – we create unforgettable events.

items.d: Strengthen team cohesion with an unforgettable event.
Birthdays, anniversaries, or just a beautiful evening with friends.
From marriage proposals to wedding celebrations.

p.d: Tell us about your planned event.
We discuss details and create an offer.
Together we plan the perfect process.

KontaktPage.sub: Tell us about your planned event.
KontaktPage.fS: Fill out the form and we will contact you.
KontaktPage.i3D: Start and end point are agreed personally to fit the route and occasion.
KontaktPage.i4D: We plan your trip flexibly around the weather and occasion.
KontaktPage.mapA: Flexible boarding point along the Basel Rhine

RhyloungePage.sub: The RhyLounge combines comfort, hospitality and a special atmosphere on the Rhine. Its heated interior, sun deck and personal service create the right setting for unforgettable hours on board.
RhyloungePage.fD: A thoughtfully designed setting awaits you on board. The heated interior with large windows, sun deck, onboard toilet and comfortable equipment make every cruise pleasant and uncomplicated in any season.
RhyloungePage.cQ: We love the water, hospitality and the special encounters that happen on the Rhine. Every cruise is different because every occasion is different. We personally take care of planning, service and delivery so you can focus fully on your time on board.

PreisePage.sub: Every trip is tailored to the occasion, duration, route and service. Contact us for a personal offer.
PreisePage.fSub: Find quick answers to the most common questions. We are happy to help you with further information.
PreisePage.bSub: We are happy to advise you personally and create an individual offer for you.
